text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa! What's going on?! My
body feels all warm and fuzzy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm overflowing with power—like plain old
me's a little bit more than ordinary now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Could this be thanks to the Three Goddesses?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna run with everything I have!
